summary: SSE 경고 이벤트가 EventStream에 2건 수신되었으나, ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED로 인해 Copilot UI에는 generic error만 표시됨

blocking.mechanism: H2 connection close after SSE warning delivery

warning_delivery.eventstream_tab: 2 SSE events visible with Korean warning text
warning_delivery.ui_shows: I'm sorry but there was an error. Please try again.

details.response_tab: Nothing to preview - This request has no response data available

diagnosis.root_cause: Etap sends SSE warning events successfully (2 events received in EventStream tab) but then closes the H2 connection. Copilot frontend treats ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED as a fatal error and shows generic error message instead of rendering the received SSE events.

comparison_with_previous.issue_007: Thinking 무한대기 -> RESOLVED (no longer infinite waiting)
comparison_with_previous.issue_022: 로그인 필요 -> RESOLVED (logged in, normal mode works)
comparison_with_previous.issue_024: 민감 프롬프트 미사용 -> RESOLVED (Korean sensitive prompt used)

diagnosis.improvement_from_build16: is_http2=2 keep-alive + END_STREAM=false + SSE formatting allows SSE events to be received by Chrome. 2 events in EventStream. Previous builds had 0 events or Thinking infinite wait.
diagnosis.remaining_issue: Connection close after SSE events triggers ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, which Copilot treats as error. Need to either: 1) keep connection alive longer, 2) send proper SSE done event before closing, or 3) match Copilot expected SSE termination sequence e.g. data: [DONE].
diagnosis.fix_suggestion: Send data: [DONE] SSE termination event before closing connection, matching GitHub Copilot expected SSE protocol. Copilot likely expects a clean SSE stream termination rather than an abrupt connection close.
